text.title: Go-to-Market Strategy Core Rules
text.summary: 6 testable rules every application of `Go-to-Market Strategy` must enforce. Each rule pairs a binary check with a sourced rationale.

rule.statement: MUST define exactly ONE ICP (Ideal Customer Profile) WITH an explicit anti-ICP (who we will NOT sell to). Multi-ICP strategies are forbidden in early GTM.

rationale.source: April Dunford; Bob Moesta JTBD; Sequoia GTM teardowns

rule.rationale: One ICP forces messaging focus; anti-ICP forces sales discipline. Without anti-ICP, sales takes any deal + ICP rots within months.

rule.statement: Positioning MUST follow the For/Who/Is/Unlike/We structure: For [ICP] Who [need] Is [category] Unlike [alternatives] We [only-we]. Free-form taglines forbidden in strategy spec.

rationale.source: Geoffrey Moore Crossing the Chasm positioning template

rule.rationale: Structured statement forces complete thought — buyer + need + category + alternatives + differentiator. Free-form skips fields; skips become silent assumptions.

rule.statement: MUST pick 2-3 channels for initial GTM. More splits resource + attention. Fewer than 2 = single point of failure.
rule.rationale: Multi-channel beyond 3 = under-invest in each. Single channel = fragile. 2-3 = focus + redundancy. Mark experimental channels separately.

rule.statement: Sales motion MUST be picked by ACV: < $5k → PLG/self-serve; $5k-$50k → inside sales; $50k-$500k → field sales; > $500k → enterprise rep. Mismatched motion + ACV always loses money.

rationale.source: David Skok SaaSomatically; Bessemer 'building a sales-led SaaS'

rule.rationale: ACV determines CAC tolerance + sales touch-points affordable. $1k ACV with field sales = -50% margin. ACV-motion mismatch is one of top-5 GTM failures.

rule.statement: Every claim in the GTM spec MUST be tagged ASSUMPTION or EVIDENCED. Unverified claims are tracked + scheduled for validation.

rationale.source: Steve Blank Lean LaunchPad; assumption tracking

rule.rationale: Untagged claims become beliefs become 'facts'. Explicit ASSUMPTION tag preserves uncertainty + drives validation work.

rule.statement: When preconditions in Applies If fail OR any item in Skip If triggers, do not run this methodology. Document the skip rationale in the artefact's parent log.
rule.rationale: Misapplied methodologies are worse than no methodology — they consume review cycles and produce false confidence.
